title: Traveler's Backpack Textures (Cobblemon) [Neoforge]
description: A resource pack for the latest version of the Traveler's Backpack mod.
body:
# 🎒 Traveler's Backpack Textures (Cobblemon) Transform your Traveler's Backpack with designs inspired by the world of Cobblemon. This texture pack now features **28 backpacks** with your favorite Pokémon! [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/3zTkREPep) ---
--- ## 🔥 VERSION 1.5 - THE LEGENDARY UPDATE IS OUT NOW! 🔥
### 🆕 New Pokémon Backpacks (7) - 🧬 **Mewtwo** (Enderman) - The legendary Genetic Pokémon - 🌑 **Umbreon** (Wither) - The moonlight Pokémon - 💧 **Vaporeon** (Sponge) - The bubble jet Pokémon - 🎃 **Gourgeist** (Pumpkin) - The pumpkin Pokémon - 🌵 **Maractus** (Cactus) - The cactus Pokémon - 🐇 **Scorbunny** (Blaze) - The rabbit Pokémon - 🎭 **Mimikyu** (Skeleton) - The disguise Pokémon ### 🔄 Reassignment - ⚡ **Pikachu** moved from Blaze → **Quartz** (Haste ability) ### ✅ NeoForge Compatibility – FINALLY FIXED! - 3D ears and horns now render correctly on NeoForge ### 🌍 6 New Languages - English (UK, CA), French (CA), Czech, Chinese (TW), Vietnamese – now 23 languages total! ### 🎨 Small Texture Improvements - Minor visual refinements for Miltank, Lucario and Standard backpack --- ## ✨ Features - **28 custom textures** for Traveler's Backpack - **Iconic Pokémon** including Pikachu, Charmander, Bulbasaur, and Squirtle - **Includes modern Pokémon** like Lechonk, Sprigatito, Scorbunny and Mimikyu - **Legendary Pokémon** like Mewtwo - **Special Team Rocket backpack** for the coal variant - **Standard Pokémon backpack** for the basic model - **🎉 3D Ears** – Pikachu, Lucario, Glaceon, Eevee, Sprigatito, Lycanroc - **✅ NeoForge Compatibility FIXED** – Now works perfectly on NeoForge - **Textures faithful to** the Minecraft and Cobblemon style - **Multilingual support** in **23 languages** --- ## 📦 Currently Included Backpacks (28) | Backpack Type | Pokémon | |--------------|---------| | **Standard** | 🎒 **Pokémon (generic)** | | **Coal** | 🔴 **Team Rocket** | | **Snow** | ❄️ **Glaceon** | | **Melon** | 🌱 **Bulbasaur** | | **Blaze** | 🐇 **Scorbunny** | | **Magma Cube** | 🔥 **Charmander** | | **Pig** | 🐷 **Lechonk** | | **Squid** | 💧 **Squirtle** | | **Villager** | 🟣 **Ditto** | | **Ghast** | 👻 **Gengar** | | **Fox** | 💙 **Lucario** | | **Spider** | 🕷️ **Ariados** | | **Sheep** | 🟡 **Mareep** | | **Cake** | 😴 **Snorlax** | | **Bat** | 🦇 **Crobat** | | **Iron Golem** | 🪨 **Golett** | | **Chicken** | 🐔 **Torchic** | | **Cow** | 🐮 **Miltank** | | **Wolf** | 🐺 **Lycanroc** | | **Horse** | 🟤 **Eevee** | | **Ocelot** | 🌿 **Sprigatito** | | **Wither** | 🌑 **Umbreon** | | **Sponge** | 💧 **Vaporeon** | | **Pumpkin** | 🎃 **Gourgeist** | | **Cactus** | 🌵 **Maractus** | | **Skeleton** | 🎭 **Mimikyu** | | **Enderman** | 🧬 **Mewtwo** | | **Quartz** | ⚡ **Pikachu** | --- ## 🔄 Future Plans I plan to add more Pokémon backpacks in future updates! Feel free to suggest your favorites in Discord. ### ✅ Current Release (V 1.5 - The Legendary Update): - 🧬 **MEWTWO** (Enderman) – The legendary Genetic Pokémon! - 🆕 **6 more new Pokémon backpacks** (Umbreon, Vaporeon, Gourgeist, Maractus, Scorbunny, Mimikyu) - 🔄 **Pikachu** moved to Quartz - ✅ **NeoForge compatibility FIXED!** - 🌍 **6 new languages** (23 total) - 🎨 **Small texture improvements** (Miltank, Lucario, Standard) More Pokémon coming soon... Suggestions welcome! --- ## 🌍 Supported Languages (23) | Bandera | Idioma | Código | |---------|--------|--------| | 🇺🇸 | English (US) | `en_us` | | 🇬🇧 | English (UK) | `en_gb` | | 🇨🇦 | English (Canada) | `en_ca` | | 🇪🇸 | Spanish (Spain) | `es_es` | | 🇲🇽 | Spanish (Mexico) | `es_mx` | | 🇧🇷 | Portuguese (Brazil) | `pt_br` | | 🇵🇹 | Portuguese (Portugal) | `pt_pt` | | 🇫🇷 | French (France) | `fr_fr` | | 🇨🇦 | French (Canada) | `fr_ca` | | 🇩🇪 | German | `de_de` | | 🇮🇹 | Italian | `it_it` | | 🇯🇵 | Japanese | `ja_jp` | | 🇰🇷 | Korean | `ko_kr` | | 🇵🇱 | Polish | `pl_pl` | | 🇨🇿 | Czech | `cs_cz` | | 🇷🇺 | Russian | `ru_ru` | | 🇨🇳 | Chinese (Simplified) | `zh_cn` | | 🇹🇼 | Chinese (Traditional) | `zh_tw` | | 🇳🇱 | Dutch | `nl_nl` | | 🇸🇪 | Swedish | `sv_se` | | 🇹🇷 | Turkish | `tr_tr` | | 🇺🇦 | Ukrainian | `uk_ua` | | 🇻🇳 | Vietnamese | `vi_vn` | **Total: 23 languages supported!** 🌍✨ --- ## 📥 Installation 1. Download the file 2. Make sure you have the [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack) mod installed 3. **⚠️ IMPORTANT:** Before installing the new version, please **remove the old version** of this resource pack from your `resourcepacks` folder to avoid conflicts 4. Place the new file in your `resourcepacks` folder 5. Activate it in Options > Resource Packs menu > **Note:** Always remove the previous version before adding a new one to prevent texture conflicts or duplicate entries. --- ## 📥 **Fabric Users – Please use the original project** This is the **NeoForge version** of the pack. If you are looking for the **Fabric version**, please go to the original project: 👉 **[Traveler's Backpack Textures (Cobblemon) [Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/travelersbackpacktextures)** - **NeoForge** users: You're in the right place! - **Fabric** users: Please use the link above for downloads and updates. --- ## 🎮 Compatibility - ✅ **NeoForge** – Works on Minecraft **1.20.x, 1.21.x and 26.x** (fixed in V 1.5!) - ✅ Traveler's Backpack (latest version) - ✅ Client and server side - ✅ Compatible with any mod that uses Traveler's Backpack --- ## ❤️ Credits & Community - **Original textures:** [TmorenoL](https://modrinth.com/user/TmorenoL) - **Traveler's Backpack mod:** Created by [Tiviacz1337](https://modrinth.com/user/Tiviacz1337) - **💜 Special thanks to Jasmine** for her incredible help in identifying and reporting the NeoForge compatibility issue. This fix wouldn't have been possible without you! Special thanks to the Traveler's Backpack mod for the amazing backpack system! --- ## 📌 Notes If you find any bugs or want to suggest more Pokémon for future updates, feel free to leave a comment! --- *Now featuring **28 Pokémon backpacks** with support for **23 languages** – now working perfectly on NeoForge!* 🎒🧬✨ ⭐ **Like, comment and follow the project for more updates!** ⭐
